_INSTRUCTIONS: This file contains your Azure and Microsoft 365 settings.
Replace ALL values marked with <<CHANGE THIS>> with your actual values.
To find your Tenant ID: Azure Portal > Microsoft Entra ID > Overview
To find your Subscription ID: Azure Portal > Subscriptions

azure.tenant_id: <<CHANGE THIS: Your Azure Tenant ID, e.g., 12345678-1234-1234-1234-123456789abc>>
azure.tenant_name: <<CHANGE THIS: Your organization name, e.g., Contoso>>
azure.subscription_id: <<CHANGE THIS: Your Azure Subscription ID, e.g., 87654321-4321-4321-4321-cba987654321>>
azure.subscription_name: <<CHANGE THIS: Your subscription name, e.g., Production>>
azure.resource_group: <<CHANGE THIS: Resource group name, e.g., rg-sharepoint-sites>>
azure.location: <<CHANGE THIS: Azure region, e.g., uksouth, westeurope, eastus>>

m365.tenant_name: <<CHANGE THIS: Your M365 tenant name (the part before .onmicrosoft.com), e.g., contoso>>
m365.admin_email: <<CHANGE THIS: SharePoint admin email, e.g., admin@contoso.onmicrosoft.com>>

_HOW_TO_ADD_MORE_ENVIRONMENTS: To add another environment (e.g., Production, Development, Staging):
1. Copy the entire block from { 'name': 'Default' ... } to its closing }
2. Paste it AFTER the closing } but BEFORE the ] of the environments array
3. Add a comma after the first environment's closing }
5. Update all the values for the new environment
}                           <-- No comma on the last one
